sql--sql-v2--draft.title: SQL Foundations
sql--sql-v2--draft.description: Learn to read tables, write SELECT queries, filter rows, sort results, and handle real-world beginner data.
sql--sql-v2--draft.moreComingSoon: More SQL Foundations lessons are coming soon.

sql-v2-0.title: Getting Started with SQL and Databases
sql-v2-0.description: Build a strong visual foundation for SQL: what SQL is, how tables work, how databases answer questions, and how to use the SQL workspace.
outcomes: Explain what SQL is used for in real applications.
Identify tables, rows, columns, records, and fields.
Read simple table data and describe what it means.
Use the browser SQL workspace to run a beginner query.
why: Builds confidence with getting started with sql and databases.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-1.title: Your First Queries with SELECT
sql-v2-1.description: Teach learners to retrieve data confidently with SELECT and FROM before filtering or joining tables.
outcomes: Write SELECT queries that retrieve data from one table.
Choose specific columns instead of always selecting every column.
Use FROM to identify the table being queried.
Read a query result table and explain what was returned.
why: Builds confidence with your first queries with select.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-2.title: Filtering Data with WHERE
sql-v2-2.description: Introduce decision-making in queries by teaching learners to keep only the rows they actually need.
outcomes: Use WHERE to return only rows that match a condition.
Compare text and numbers with beginner SQL operators.
Combine conditions with AND, OR, and NOT.
Debug common filtering mistakes in simple SQL queries.
why: Builds confidence with filtering data with where.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-3.title: Sorting and Limiting Results
sql-v2-3.description: Help beginners control output so answers are easier to read, rank, and compare.
outcomes: Sort query results with ORDER BY.
Use ASC and DESC to control sort direction.
Use LIMIT to show a smaller result set.
Combine filtering, sorting, and limiting in one query.
why: Builds confidence with sorting and limiting results.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-4.title: Working with Text, Lists, Ranges, and NULL
sql-v2-4.description: Expand filtering to real-world cases like partial text, multiple choices, ranges, and missing values.
outcomes: Search partial text with LIKE and wildcards.
Filter multiple values with IN and NOT IN.
Filter ranges with BETWEEN.
Find missing and present values with IS NULL and IS NOT NULL.
why: Builds confidence with working with text, lists, ranges, and null.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-5.title: Capstone: Customer Follow-Up Report
sql-v2-5.description: Pull the course skills together in one final reporting task that feels like a beginner analyst handoff.
outcomes: Combine selection, filtering, ordering, and limiting in one practical query flow.
Revise a working query without losing earlier progress.
Build a clean report that highlights real customer follow-up needs.
why: Builds confidence with capstone: customer follow-up report.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-1.title: What SQL Is
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-1.description: Understand what SQL means, what databases are, and why SQL is useful.
bullets: SQL helps answer questions about data
Real systems use databases every day

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-2.title: Understanding Tables
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-2.description: Learn how rows, columns, records, fields, and names make table data readable.
bullets: Names help you understand the table

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-3.title: Database Thinking
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-3.description: Practice thinking about data as questions, structure, and reliable identifiers.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-4.title: First SQL Environment
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-4.description: Use the Zoeskoul SQL workspace to run queries and read result tables.
bullets: Use the Tables view as support

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-module-proje.description: Apply the module introduction by exploring a student roster.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-1.title: Intro to SELECT
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-1.description: Learn what select does, selecting all columns with *, selecting specific columns through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-2.title: Reading Data from a Table
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-2.description: Learn from and table names, choosing the right columns, viewing clean results through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-3.title: SQL Syntax Basics
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-3.description: Learn sql keywords, semicolons, uppercase vs. lowercase through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-4.title: Practice with Basic Queries
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-4.description: Learn query one column, query multiple columns, query full tables through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-module-proje.description: Learn module 1 product starter sheet project through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-1.title: Intro to Filtering
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-1.description: Learn why filtering matters, the where clause, matching exact values through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-2.title: Comparison Operators
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-2.description: Learn equals comparison, not-equal comparison, greater-than comparison through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-3.title: Filtering with Multiple Conditions
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-3.description: Learn and conditions, or conditions, not conditions through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-4.title: Beginner Filtering Practice
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-4.description: Learn filter by number, filter by text, filter by more than one rule through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Filter By More Than One Rule

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-module-proje.description: Learn module 2 inventory watchlist project through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-1.title: Sorting Data
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-1.description: Learn why sorting matters, order by, ascending order through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-2.title: Sorting by Multiple Columns
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-2.description: Learn primary sort, secondary sort, sorting text through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-3.title: Limiting Output
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-3.description: Learn why limit results, the limit clause, top rows only through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-4.title: Practice with Output Control
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-4.description: Learn find highest values, find lowest values, show top 5 records through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-module-proje.description: Learn module 3 sales leaderboard project through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-1.title: Text Matching
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-1.description: Learn intro to like, percent wildcard (%), underscore wildcard (_) through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-2.title: Lists and Ranges
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-2.description: Learn in list filter, not in list filter, between range filter through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-3.title: Missing Data
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-3.description: Learn what null means, is null, is not null through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-4.title: Search and Cleanup Practice
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-4.description: Learn search names, filter statuses, find missing data through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-module-proje.description: Learn module 4 customer cleanup project through focused examples and practice.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-5-capstone-pro.title: Capstone Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-5-capstone-pro.description: Learn module 5 customer follow-up capstone through focused examples and practice.
